---
title: "ChronicleLink"
---
<!-- DO NOT EDIT! This file was auto-generated by crates/build/re_types_builder/src/codegen/docs/website.rs -->

A causal or relational link between two Chronicle events.

Links represent directed edges in the event graph (e.g. "payment failure
caused support ticket"). They are rendered as Bezier arcs in the
ChronicleTimelineView.

## Fields
### Required
* `source_event`: [`ChronicleSourceEvent`](../components/chronicle_source_event.md)
* `target_event`: [`ChronicleTargetEvent`](../components/chronicle_target_event.md)
* `link_type`: [`ChronicleLinkType`](../components/chronicle_link_type.md)

### Recommended
* `confidence`: [`ChronicleConfidence`](../components/chronicle_confidence.md)

### Optional
* `reasoning`: [`ChronicleReasoning`](../components/chronicle_reasoning.md)
* `color`: [`Color`](../components/color.md)


## Can be shown in
* [ChronicleTimelineView](../views/chronicle_timeline_view.md)
* [DataframeView](../views/dataframe_view.md)
